page_flags: Visual circle task (4 misclassified items at Leo's threshold) cannot be captured from text. Expected: Jelibon, Kraker, Yulaf Ezmesi, Avokado.

WS4_B4.note: Internally consistent. Total=20 implies a 20-item dataset; cross-check against WS5 (10 items) for a possible version difference.

warnings: Circle task not captured: cannot verify the student read the 4 misclassified items from the table.
Denominator 20 vs WS5's 10-item dataset is a possible worksheet-version discrepancy.
gate_2_validation.engagement_note: All text items complete. Best threshold chosen with an MCR criterion, comparison given, formula executed correctly, Pia evaluation reasoned. Engagement high.

WS4_B1.note: Valid best threshold; MCR=0.20 confirmed by B4.

WS4_B2.evidence: MCR en düşük olan eşik değeri

WS4_B3.evidence: Eşik 10'da MCR 0.20, eşik 8'de MCR 0.30 — 10 daha iyi.
WS4_B3.note: Both MCR values cited with their thresholds.

WS4_B5.evidence: Pia'nın ifadesi doğru; en düşük MCR en az hata demektir.
WS4_B5.note: Links MCR to its meaning, not bare agreement.

gate_3_scoring.scoring_note: All five text items full credit. The uncaptured circle task does not affect text-based scoring. Strong metric-based threshold selection and formula application.

gate_4_aicft_evidence.scope_note: Per-worksheet LO evidence only. No level is assigned here.

LO3.1.1.note: MCR formula applied with correct arithmetic.

LO3.2.1.note: Threshold chosen by comparing MCR across alternatives, not by intuition.

LO3.2.2.note: MCR interpreted as classification error rate when evaluating a peer's claim.

gate_4_aicft_evidence.portfolio_contribution: Strongest single Deepen signal in the unplugged sequence. Moves from 'what is MCR' (WS1) to 'use MCR to choose between models' (WS4).
